# Implexa

Implexa is the cross-vendor skill graph for AI work, a unified index of every public SKILL.md from Anthropic, Smithery, ClawHub, Skills.sh, and the agentskills.io standard, with an ambient recommender that surfaces the right skill in your Claude Code / Codex / Cursor session.

## What we do

1. Aggregator: every public SKILL.md, indexed.
2. Recommender: ambient sidecar surfaces top-3 best-fit skills mid-task.
3. Wiki: living docs, community edit and merge, karma and attribution.

Cross-vendor by design. Works in Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and every agentskills.io-compatible runtime.

## Featured Pages

- [/](https://implexa.ai/) Homepage with skill search
- [/install](https://implexa.ai/install) Install instructions for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor
- [/s/<source>/<slug>](https://implexa.ai/s/anthropic/example) Skill detail pages (canonical URLs for every indexed SKILL.md)
- [/u/<handle>](https://implexa.ai/u/founder-implexa) Contributor profiles

## API

- POST https://core.implexa.ai/api/v2/mcp MCP endpoint for programmatic access (requires Bearer token)
- GET https://implexa.ai/api/search?q=<query> Public search proxy

## Contact

founder@implexa.ai
